name: Crudites with Vomit Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the vegetables in warm water, except the mushroom caps. Wipe those gently with a damp paper towel.
2. Slice the carrots, zucchini, and celery into thin sticks.
3. The cherry tomatoes can be served whole, but you may want to remove any green stems. The radishes and mushrooms can be halved or served whole.
4. If not serving immediately, place the vegetables in a plastic bag and store them in the refrigerator to keep them fresh and crispy.
5. In a small bowl, mix the cottage cheese, onion soup mix, and milk. Stir in some food coloring until you achieve the desired yellowish color. Do not overmix; lumpy is more realistic!
6. Arrange your vegetables on a platter surrounding the Vomit Vinaigrette. The Vomit Vinaigrette tastes great in sandwiches too! Try splattering some into pita pockets!
